title: 10 precautions to take when using Rehmannia glutinosa (Rehmannia) for medicinal purposes
intro: Rehmannia glutinosa, a plant commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine, should be used with caution due to potential side effects and interactions. It is crucial to consult with a healthcare provider before starting any new herbal remedy, as it can interact with certain medications and medical conditions. Pregnant or breastfeeding women should avoid using Rehmannia glutinosa, as its safety during these times has not been established. When using Rehmannia glutinosa, it is essential to follow the recommended dosage to reduce the risk of adverse effects, and it is also important to purchase the plant material or supplement from a reputable source to ensure quality and safety. Lastly, it is advised to avoid driving or operating heavy machinery while using Rehmannia glutinosa, as it may cause dizziness or drowsiness in some individuals.
